foundation.theorem: one machine-checked self-proven theorem: there is no nothing
foundation.trace: One -> fold spectrum -> binary count 2 and colour count 3 -> three-residue windows sharing two residues -> v3 target-incapable geometry -> sequence selector

orientation_relation.window: colour_count() from the fold period spectrum
orientation_relation.overlap: binary_count() from the fold period spectrum
orientation_relation.geometric_readout: dimensionless topology of the terminal three-residue window
orientation_relation.propagation: each new colour window shares the preceding binary residue pair, carrying its local bend into the next selection

primary: terminal colour-window hydrophobic dispersion relative to its endogenous step
terminal colour-window radius squared relative to its endogenous step
secondary: complete-prefix hydrophobic dispersion relative to its endogenous step
complete-prefix radius squared relative to its endogenous step

frontier_optimization.rule: sort all candidates by the primary local key; compute the complete-prefix secondary key only for candidates at or below the 24th local-key boundary, including every boundary tie
frontier_optimization.exactness: a candidate above the 24th primary-key boundary cannot enter a 24-state frontier under any secondary key
frontier_optimization.purpose: avoid complete-prefix construction for candidates mathematically excluded by the primary orientation relation

component_routes.24_lattice: forward-forced exact finite state constitution from the protected construction
component_routes.peptide_geometry: named forward-forcing constitution with byte-exact protected-witness replay

status: development relation awaiting source-bound applied protein data
